is a mysterious resource that enables the omni-directional mobility gear to function. They are only found on Paradis Island.

Characteristics

According to Zeke Jaeger, Iceburst Stones are only found on Paradis Island. As a result, they are extremely rare and valuable. The people of Paradis are ignorant of how valuable the stones would be to the outside world. He claims that the mineral can make a struggling nation like Hizuru prosper.

Applications

Due to the practicality of such amounts of gas coming naturally in compact, solid forms, the Iceburst Stones are used as the source of gas which powers the omni-directional mobility gear.

The people of Hizuru were able to produce a flying boat by using the Iceburst Stone as fuel.
